project: Providing consultations in the area of Genetic Programming
title: Poskytovani konzultaci v oblasti genetickeho programovani - doplnkova cinnost

english_title.label: English title
english_title.text: Providing consultations in the area of Genetic Programming

keywords.label: Keywords
keywords.text: evolutionary algorithm, evolution strategy, genetic algorithm, genetic programming, logistic plan

abstract.label: Abstract
abstract.text: The aim of this project is to provide consultations related to the solution of the master thesis of mr. David Sedlak, a student of BUT FIT, in the cooperation of the company Center for Genetic proggramming, s.r.o. The work is focused on the generation and optimization of logistic plans.

team_members.label: Team members
team_members.text: Bidlo Michal, doc. Ing., Ph.D. (DCSY) – research leader
